subcodes.first_line: O herald and Hand of the Cause of God! Thy letter was perused and its contents were noted. The duty [3.5s]... ...All government employees, whether of high or low rank, should, with perfect integrity, probity and rectitude, content themselves with the modest stipends and allowances that are theirs
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی و ایادی امر الله مکتوب شما مرموق و رق مسطور منظور گردید تکلیف در
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @eulogies; reminiscences, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels
